sections.paragraph:
f. (from זָמַם)-

(1) counsel, in a bad sense, Pro 21:27 24:8 more rarely in a good sense, Job 17:11 (in which passage allusion is made to the derivation of the word: see what is said under the root).

(2) wickedness, a wicked deed. Psal. 26:10 119:150 . Especially used in speaking of sins of uncleanness, such as fornication, rape, or incest. Lev 18:17, זִמָּה הִיא “this would be wickedness.” Job 31:11 Eze 16:27 22:9 , 11 Eze 22:11.

(3) [Zimmah], pr.n. m. 1Ch 6:5, 27 1Ch 6:27 2Ch 29:12.
